evals.prompt: Create low-fi wireframes for the Libresse app based on the design spec in design/design-spec.md. Start with the Home Dashboard and Daily Log screens.
evals.expected_output: Two mobile wireframes (393x852) in a .pen file: Home Dashboard with cycle ring, phase banner, nudge card, quick log button, and upcoming strip; Daily Log with flow selector, mood picker, symptom tags, and save button. Grayscale only.

evals.prompt: Wireframe the main navigation flow for the Libresse app — all four tab screens (Home, My Cycle, Shop, Assistant) with a bottom tab bar.
evals.expected_output: Four mobile screens with consistent bottom tab bar, each showing the primary content layout for its section. Arranged on canvas in a logical group.
